title: TOSY Magnet Cube 2x2-8 Blocks, 2in1 Toy: 2x2x2 Puzzle Cube and Customizable Infinity Cube, Easter Birthday Gifts for Kids/Grandkids, Glowing with UV Flashlight, Sensory/STEM Toy
features: MAGNET PUZZLE CUBE 2X2 - Featuring 64 magnets (8 in each corner of the cube), our TOSY Magnet Cube 2x2x2 can be rotated and rearranged in any way, allowing you to explore the cube inside out, and improve your puzzle solving skills

GLOW IN THE DARK BUILDING BLOCKS - Create over 100 different shapes from the eight cubes. Use the included UV Flashlight on your design to make it glow beautifully. Smooth surface ensures safety and comfort to play individually or with friends and family

CUSTOMIZABLE INFINITY CUBE - You can also turn this product into an Infinity Cube in various shapes and sizes. Flip and fold smoothly and effortlessly in any direction and angle to relieve stress, anxiety, focus better, and increase your dexterity

SENSORY and FIDGET TOY - This STEAM accredited toy offers many benefits for all, including kids 6+, teenagers, and adults: encouraging brain activity, increasing dexterity, relieving stress and anxiety, and improving geometry and creative thinking

PERFECT GIFT - This is an excellent gift for many holidays and special occasions (Birthdays, Valentine, Christmas, Easter, Mother's Day, Back to School...). Visit our TOSY Store for a complete collection of other best-selling products
